title: Orders & facturen.
desc: Bekijk, volg en download al uw bestellingen en facturen op één centrale plek.

treatments.brief: A combined orders+invoices table: rows (order# · datum · bedrag · status badge · download icon) for recent orders, mixed statuses.
An order-tracking timeline: Besteld -> Verzonden -> Onderweg (navy live node) -> Geleverd, for one order, with dates.
A download center: a list of invoices (Factuur maart/feb/jan 2026 · €) each with a download icon + a 'download alle' action.
An order-status overview: 3 stat tiles (Open 4 / Onderweg 2 / Geleverd 18) + a small recent-orders strip.
A single order detail with its invoice: order header (PO-2026-0481 · MS Aldebaran) + 2-3 items + a 'Factuur' link/row.
